title: [TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero
description: The most Immersive and Customizable modern FPS experience in Minecraft - A complete Remaster of the TaC gun mod by the original team.
body:
![head banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9108495a9fe2ae5a24362a78f0090d1c499452b5.png)

# The most immersive Minecraft FPS gaming experience --
- Sophisticated shooting, maneuvering, and inspecting animations
- Well-designed gun craft system - Modify your guns, survival friendly!
- Refined models and optimization go hand in hand - LOD optimization strategies
- Compatibility - Compatible with most shaders, play with confidence!
- Feel free to customize the guns' data via **config** and **data JSON**! （need [Cloth Config API](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)）
- If you want - Create your own **GUN PACKS** without any coding!  

**TaCZ was developed by reorganizing the original TaC development team devs, completely rewriting all the code, remaking the models and animations, and adding and modifying many features-**
## Versions 1.18.2 and 1.20.1 are now supported!  

# **Features**~~~~
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![reloading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ac3a1ef2909e3434bd01e7b46ff5a0694fda5b4.png)  
Unique reloading and inspection animation - every gun is different!  
![attachment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91d5a63f52a3b3c62f2d06036d77ba5216cda5a8.png)  
Modify your weapon with the new attachment UI  
![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45ecd4ec9d86fce5493ab9e5eeaf82a61743f864.jpeg)  
Crafting in exclusive workbenches - Survival Friendly  
![scope](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6af21838e3317f2d68bdcc0b3d612ec4e6bf0abe.png)  
Visualization and compatibility at the same time - new scope view implementation  

</details>  

## Latest Showcase Video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bG9-8agYVyI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Official Gunpack
**How to install：(1.0.3 release version and earlier)**    
Open the .minecraft folder, go to "config/tacz/custom", put the .zip file in it (no need to unzip), and it's ready to play. If not, try command "/tacz reload" in game.

**How to install：(1.1.4 release version and later)**    
Open your game version folder, go to ".minecraft/tacz," put the .zip file in it (there's no need to unzip), and it's ready to play. If not, try the command "/tacz reload" or the command "/reload" in-game.

**Attention: **    
The in-game auto-convert system will not work on nonstandard gun packs. If you can't convert your unpack, please wait for the author of that unpack to update to the 1.1.4 version instead of contacting us.

## Installation Help
**REQUIRES**(mandatory): No mandatory mod required! The current version will have a better shadow experience on Oculus.
